practice.name: Problem 12 (2017 AIME I)
practice.statement: This is a 2017 AIME I problem focusing on Cauchy-Schwarz inequality. See the full problem statement on [AoPS](https://artofproblemsolving.com/wiki/index.php/2017_AIME_I_Problems/Problem_12).

practice.name: Problem 10 (2016 AIME I)
